title: Backend Developer Vacancy at FarmERP - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at FarmERP - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
FarmERP invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FarmERP:
FarmERP is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FarmERP!
